creator: rfarmer768@gmail.com
text:
urtw(4) man page says adding:

device urtw

to a kernel config should build urtw in. I get:

config: Error: device "urtw" is unknown

Fix: Add entry for urtw to /usr/src/sys/conf/files

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to build a kernel with "device urtw"
